audit_items.proof_trace: nfp_app.h contains no direct memory allocations — all inline wrappers are thin delegators to nfp_app_type callbacks. The implementation (nfp_app.c) has two allocations: kzalloc() in nfp_app_alloc() is paired with kfree() in nfp_app_free(), and alloc_skb() in nfp_app_ctrl_msg_alloc() uses ownership-transfer semantics where callers either transmit (nfp_ctrl_tx) or free (kfree_skb) on all paths. All resource-management pairs (vnic_alloc/free, repr_init/clean, start/stop) are properly balanced in nfp_net_main.c with correct goto-based error handling covering every path.
